name.description: The name of the ECS service

cluster.description: The ARN of the ECS cluster to run the service on

availability_zone_rebalancing.description: The availability zone rebalancing strategy to use

task_definition.description: The ARN of the task definition to run on the service

launch_type.description: The launch type on which to run your service

force_delete.description: Whether to force a new deployment of the service

desired_count.description: The number of instances of the task to run on the service

platform_version.description: The platform version on which to run your service

propagate_tags.description: Specifies whether to propagate the tags to the tasks

scheduling_strategy.description: The scheduling strategy to use for the service

deployment_maximum_percent.description: The upper limit of the number of tasks in a service

deployment_minimum_healthy_percent.description: The lower limit of the number of tasks in a service

enable_ecs_managed_tags.description: Whether to enable Amazon ECS managed tags for the service

enable_execute_command.description: Whether to enable execute command for the service

force_new_deployment.description: Whether to force a new deployment of the service

health_check_grace_period_seconds.description: The period of time, in seconds, that the Amazon ECS service scheduler ignores unhealthy Elastic Load Balancing target health checks after a task has started

iam_role.description: The IAM role to use for the service

wait_for_steady_state.description: Whether to wait for the service to reach a steady state before proceeding

tags.description: A map of tags to add to all resources

load_balancer.description: A list of load balancer configuration blocks
load_balancer.type: list(object({ target_group_arn: string, container_name: string, container_port: number, elb_name: string }))

capacity_provider_strategy.description: A list of capacity provider strategy blocks
capacity_provider_strategy.type: list(object({ capacity_provider: string, base: number, weight: number }))

deployment_circuit_breaker.description: A list of deployment circuit breaker blocks

network_configuration.description: A list of network configuration blocks
network_configuration.type: list(object({ subnets: list(string), security_groups: list(string), assign_public_ip: bool }))

deployment_controller.description: A list of deployment controller blocks

ordered_placement_strategy.description: A list of ordered placement strategy blocks

service_registries.description: A list of service registry blocks
service_registries.type: list(object({ registry_arn: string, container_name: string, container_port: number, port: number }))

timeouts.type: object({ create: optional(string), delete: optional(string), update: optional(string) })
